Geranium is a plant with medicinal properties, belonging to the family Geraniaceae. This plant is valued for its health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help with wound healing, skin issues, and immune system support. The bioactive constituents of Geranium include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and essential oils, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Geranium include teas, tinctures, and creams, which are used to treat various health conditions, such as skin irritations, digestive issues, and menstrual cramps.
